news.title: HDFC AMC reports Q4 FY26 PAT decline by 2% YoY to Rs 623 cr.
news.summary: HDFC AMC reports Q4 FY26 PAT decline by 2% YoY to Rs 623 cr.

news.title:
HDFC AMC Q4 profit drops 2.5% YoY to ₹623 crore; final dividend ₹54 for FY26.
TCS Q2 profit rises 5%, operating margin slips; 5 key highlights shared.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC Q4 profit drops 2.5% YoY to ₹623 crore; final dividend ₹54 for FY26.
TCS Q2 profit rises 5%, operating margin slips; 5 key highlights shared.

news.title:
HDFC AMC approves audited FY26 results; auditor issued unmodified opinion.
Proposed final dividend of ₹54/share; insider trading window closed till Apr 18.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC approves audited FY26 results; auditor issued unmodified opinion.
Proposed final dividend of ₹54/share; insider trading window closed till Apr 18.

news.title: HDFC AMC declared a dividend of Rs 54 per share.
news.summary: HDFC AMC declared a dividend of Rs 54 per share.

news.title: HDFC AMC posted Q4 consolidated net profit of ₹6.23B, down from ₹6.4B YoY.
news.summary: HDFC AMC posted Q4 consolidated net profit of ₹6.23B, down from ₹6.4B YoY.

news.title:
Analysts favor HDFC AMC, CAMS, KFin as top picks amid India's MF growth, with AUM CAGR projected to reach 17% by FY35.
Emkay, Axis rates HDFC AMC, KFin, CAMS as 'Buy' due to strong growth, scalability, and retail SIP-driven stability.
news.summary:
Analysts favor HDFC AMC, CAMS, KFin as top picks amid India's MF growth, with AUM CAGR projected to reach 17% by FY35.
Emkay, Axis rates HDFC AMC, KFin, CAMS as 'Buy' due to strong growth, scalability, and retail SIP-driven stability.

news.title:
Wipro, HDFC Life, HDFC AMC, CRISIL, Angel One among firms announcing Q4 results today.
Stocks in focus include HDBFS, ICICI Lombard, Elecon, Hathway, and Tejas Networks.
news.summary:
Wipro, HDFC Life, HDFC AMC, CRISIL, Angel One among firms announcing Q4 results today.
Stocks in focus include HDBFS, ICICI Lombard, Elecon, Hathway, and Tejas Networks.

news.title:
HDFC AMC Q4 results likely to show profit growth from rising AUM, equity inflows.
Robust SIP inflows and market sentiment to support fees, revenue growth.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC Q4 results likely to show profit growth from rising AUM, equity inflows.
Robust SIP inflows and market sentiment to support fees, revenue growth.

news.title:
HDFC MF announces merger of HDFC Arbitrage Fund plans effective May 22, 2026.
Unitholders can exit/switch investments without exit load from Apr 22 to May 21, 2026.
news.summary:
HDFC MF announces merger of HDFC Arbitrage Fund plans effective May 22, 2026.
Unitholders can exit/switch investments without exit load from Apr 22 to May 21, 2026.

news.title:
AMC stocks surged up to 5% on record ₹40,450 cr equity MF inflows in March, up 56% MoM.
HDFC AMC rose 4% to ₹2,611, Nippon up 3.9% to ₹945; DIIs supported markets amid FII outflows.
news.summary:
AMC stocks surged up to 5% on record ₹40,450 cr equity MF inflows in March, up 56% MoM.
HDFC AMC rose 4% to ₹2,611, Nippon up 3.9% to ₹945; DIIs supported markets amid FII outflows.

news.title:
India's equity market faces challenges as retail investors turn net sellers amidst dimming returns and conflict impacts.
Capital market intermediaries like HDFC AMC (-15%) and Motilal Oswal (-25%) face pressure, with IPO activity also slowing.
news.summary:
India's equity market faces challenges as retail investors turn net sellers amidst dimming returns and conflict impacts.
Capital market intermediaries like HDFC AMC (-15%) and Motilal Oswal (-25%) face pressure, with IPO activity also slowing.

news.title:
Capital market stocks surged as US-Iran ceasefire boosted risk appetite. Nippon AMC rose 10.9%, HDFC AMC 8.6%, and BSE 8.3%.
Analysts expect AMCs like CAMS to outperform peers despite MTM pressures. Ceasefire seen as positive, though markets remain event-driven.
news.summary:
Capital market stocks surged as US-Iran ceasefire boosted risk appetite. Nippon AMC rose 10.9%, HDFC AMC 8.6%, and BSE 8.3%.
Analysts expect AMCs like CAMS to outperform peers despite MTM pressures. Ceasefire seen as positive, though markets remain event-driven.

news.title:
HDFC AMC's Navneet Munot expects record SIP inflows amid Iran-US ceasefire, urging retail investors to stay disciplined.
Munot advises enhancing equity allocation during volatility, citing March SIP inflows to hit all-time high per AMFI data.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC's Navneet Munot expects record SIP inflows amid Iran-US ceasefire, urging retail investors to stay disciplined.
Munot advises enhancing equity allocation during volatility, citing March SIP inflows to hit all-time high per AMFI data.

news.title:
HDFC Asset Management to hold a Q4 FY26 results call on April 16, 2026.
The call will feature key executives and provide audited financial results review.
news.summary:
HDFC Asset Management to hold a Q4 FY26 results call on April 16, 2026.
The call will feature key executives and provide audited financial results review.

news.title:
Kotak expects better returns from HDFC AMC than ICICI Prudential AMC due to valuation corrections.
HDFC AMC has a 17% upside, while ICICI AMC sees 11%. Both focus on growth in alternatives and strong fund performance.
news.summary:
Kotak expects better returns from HDFC AMC than ICICI Prudential AMC due to valuation corrections.
HDFC AMC has a 17% upside, while ICICI AMC sees 11%. Both focus on growth in alternatives and strong fund performance.

news.title:
March quarter AMC profits may fall sequentially due to MTM losses and softer yields, despite steady inflows.
ICICI Pru and Nippon AMC lead growth, while UTI AMC and Canara Robeco AMC lose market share amid performance gaps.
news.summary:
March quarter AMC profits may fall sequentially due to MTM losses and softer yields, despite steady inflows.
ICICI Pru and Nippon AMC lead growth, while UTI AMC and Canara Robeco AMC lose market share amid performance gaps.

news.title:
HDFC AMC executed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 32.02 crore.
The trade involved 138,049 shares at Rs. 2319.6 per share.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC executed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 32.02 crore.

news.title:
HDFC AMC sees USD 69M inflows from MSCI Nifty semi-annual rebalancing.
Nifty index reshuffle at 3 PM today may impact HDFC AMC.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC sees USD 69M inflows from MSCI Nifty semi-annual rebalancing.

news.title:
HDFC Gold ETF can now invest up to 50% in gold derivatives, GDS, and GMS under revised rules.
The change offers cost efficiency, liquidity, and flexibility, but physical gold remains the core strategy.
news.summary:
HDFC Gold ETF can now invest up to 50% in gold derivatives, GDS, and GMS under revised rules.
The change offers cost efficiency, liquidity, and flexibility, but physical gold remains the core strategy.

news.title:
HDFC AMC Board to meet on April 16, 2026, to review audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
Dividend recommendation and trading window closure from April 1-18, 2026, also announced.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC Board to meet on April 16, 2026, to review audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
Dividend recommendation and trading window closure from April 1-18, 2026, also announced.
